formatted_response:
📊 Top 3 Positive Drivers:

1️⃣ Quick Response Time
   📈 450 of 1000 comments (45%)
   💡 HR provides fast and timely responses to employee queries and requests.
   
   Top themes:
   • Fast resolution (60%)
   • Timely support (25%)
   • Quick turnaround (15%)

2️⃣ Helpful Staff
   📈 328 of 1000 comments (32.8%)
   💡 HR team members are knowledgeable, friendly, and provide professional support to employees.
   
   Top themes:
   • Knowledgeable team (55%)
   • Friendly service (30%)
   • Professional support (15%)

3️⃣ Easy to Use System
   📈 222 of 1000 comments (22.2%)
   💡 HR systems and tools are intuitive, user-friendly, and easy to navigate.
   
   Top themes:
   • Intuitive interface (50%)
   • Simple navigation (30%)
   • User-friendly design (20%)
formatted_negative:
📊 Top 3 Negative Drivers:

1️⃣ System Downtime
   📉 385 of 1000 comments (38.5%)
   ⚠️ HR systems experience frequent outages and unavailability issues.
   
   Top themes:
   • Frequent outages (55%)
   • System unavailable (30%)
   • Access issues (15%)

2️⃣ Slow Processing
   📉 283 of 1000 comments (28.3%)
   ⚠️ HR processes take too long with delayed responses and slow system performance.
   
   Top themes:
   • Long wait times (50%)
   • Delayed responses (30%)
   • Slow system performance (20%)

3️⃣ Complex Procedures
   📉 187 of 1000 comments (18.7%)
   ⚠️ HR procedures involve too many steps with confusing processes and unclear instructions.
   
   Top themes:
   • Too many steps (45%)
   • Confusing process (35%)
   • Unclear instructions (20%)

positive_drivers.description: HR provides fast and timely responses to employee queries and requests.
HR team members are knowledgeable, friendly, and provide professional support to employees.
HR systems and tools are intuitive, user-friendly, and easy to navigate.

negative_drivers.description: HR systems experience frequent outages and unavailability issues.
HR processes take too long with delayed responses and slow system performance.
HR procedures involve too many steps with confusing processes and unclear instructions.
